priorities.review: Your work is document-primary. The monitor is the most important purchase.
priorities.drafting: 2D drafting is single-thread CPU bound but not demanding. Display quality matters more than compute.
priorities.modeling: BIM modeling is single-thread CPU bound. Clock speed governs how Revit, Rhino, and SketchUp feel, and AMD's 3D V-Cache gives it a measurable edge in Revit. The GPU is nearly invisible.
priorities.viz: Interactive viz is GPU bound. Enscape, Lumion, D5, and TwinMotion scale directly with GPU power and VRAM. The RTX 5070 Ti hits the practical sweet spot for most architecture viz.
priorities.modeling_viz: You need both: fast single-core for modeling and a capable GPU for viz. The RTX 5070 Ti is the honest sweet spot -- enough GPU for real-time viz without overspending on cores you will not use.
priorities.production: V-Ray and Corona are multi-thread CPU bound, with GPU hybrid modes. Core count drives render times -- AMD Ryzen 9 leads, and Threadripper PRO pulls further ahead for dedicated render boxes.
